description: Workflow for handling pet fetching and processing in the Purrfect Pets API app
name: purrfect_pets_workflow

transitions.description: Start fetching pet data from Petstore API
transitions.end_state_description: Fetching pet data from external API
transitions.name: start_fetch_pet_job

externalized_processors.description: Orchestrates fetching pets and processing entities
externalized_processors.name: process_pet_fetch_job

transitions.description: Complete pet fetch job and update status
transitions.name: complete_fetch_pet_job
